concept: a layered narrative script unrolling with emotional arc indicators at three levels — overall direction, scene tension, and dialogue micro-shifts — visualized as a therapeutic story generated by an AI agent for a person seeking emotional catharsis

a multi-agent AI system reading official trade tariff documents and converging on a consensus classification code for a container ship cargo manifest, with a human reviewer approving the final decision

a small business owner standing at a control panel managing several AI agent workflows with clearly labeled autonomy dials set to low and medium, while a human approval step remains visible for complex tasks
a physician reading a clean Python-style decision rule generated by an LLM from electronic health records, with an audit trail document visible in the background, set in a modern hospital data room
a financial underwriter reviewing an AI agent's tool-use trace log on a screen, with risk dollar amounts attached to each step and a safety threshold line indicating where human approval is required
